title: Compiler Roadshow Deck
audience: technical reviewers and business decision makers
goal: explain the need, architecture, capabilities, technical advantages, and user value of a modern C compiler component

slides.message: A Rust-based GCC-compatible C compiler can provide a complete and controllable compilation pipeline
A self-contained compiler pipeline reduces external toolchain dependency and improves controllability of C compilation workflows
The component follows a classic frontend, middle-end, and backend compiler architecture
